---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or a new specialist agent
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or the new specialist agent.

**Why is it useful?**
The problem it solves or the workflow it improves.

**For a new agent (if applicable)**
- Suggested division:
- Name & emoji:
- One-line description:

**Alternatives considered**
Anything else you've tried or thought about.
